---
title: "The Case for HPV Vaccination in PNG"
date: "2026-03-04"
categories: [Vaccines & Immunisation, Global Health, Data & Methods]
image: "images/cover.png"
description: "Marking International HPV Awareness Day with an interactive data story from a cervical-cancer prevention project in Papua New Guinea."
---

Today is **International HPV Awareness Day**, and to mark this important day I wanted to share a data-visualization story from a project I worked on last year in Papua New Guinea.

[![The Case for HPV Vaccination in Papua New Guinea](images/cover.png)](https://bk-advisors.github.io/hpv-png-story/)

➡️ **Explore the interactive data story:** <https://bk-advisors.github.io/hpv-png-story/>
